item.title: By: Josh
item.dc:creator: Josh
item.description:
lol @ "Initial Commit"
Wait, so that means you were like 13 when you were helping me with SexyBookmarks??? Jeez dude. You're gonna go places for sure! :)
item.content:encoded:
lol @ “Initial Commit”

Wait, so that means you were like 13 when you were helping me with SexyBookmarks??? Jeez dude. You’re gonna go places for sure! 🙂

item.title: By: smartearnbuzz.com
item.dc:creator: smartearnbuzz.com
item.description: Hi, i just read your blog properly.... such amazing way of presentation. Wish you all the best.
item.content:encoded:
Hi, i just read your blog properly…. such amazing way of presentation.
Wish you all the best.

item.title: By: Rashmi Ranjan Biswal
item.dc:creator: Rashmi Ranjan Biswal
item.description:
In reply to <a href="/about/#comment-199958">Abhishek</a>.
Hey Gautam, Good work! You achieved a lot in such a small time. Inspiring. Very well done and its good to see you growing with such quality skills is something awesome… keep up the good and hard work.
item.content:encoded:
In reply to Abhishek.

Hey Gautam,
Good work!
You achieved a lot in such a small time. Inspiring.
Very well done and its good to see you growing with such quality skills is something awesome… keep up the good and hard work.

item.title: By: Abhishek
item.dc:creator: Abhishek
item.description:
Hey Gautam,
Good work!
You achieved a lot in such a small time. Inspiring.
Can you please clean up few dead links like Discover I?
item.content:encoded:
Hey Gautam,

Good work!

You achieved a lot in such a small time. Inspiring.

Can you please clean up few dead links like Discover I?

item.title: By: Rakesh
item.dc:creator: Rakesh
item.description: Great work dude! Keep it up:D

item.title: By: Chinoms
item.dc:creator: Chinoms
item.description: Hey, Gautam. You're really good. I'm really inspired by your portfolio.
item.content:encoded: Hey, Gautam. You’re really good. I’m really inspired by your portfolio.

item.title: By: Rajendra Dhanotiya

item.description: Very well done and its good to see you growing with such quality skills is something awesomeâ€¦ keep up the good and hard work

item.title: By: Sai Nikhil Thirandas
item.dc:creator: Sai Nikhil Thirandas
item.description:
Cool Man!
I'm really impressed after reading your Bio. Every teen should be greatly inspired by you. :)
Thanks, Sai
item.content:encoded:
Cool Man!

I’m really impressed after reading your Bio. Every teen should be greatly inspired by you. 🙂

Thanks,
Sai

item.title: By: Miranda
item.dc:creator: Miranda
item.description: I saw you have developed an android OCR app using tesseract. I am now doing the same thing. I think you are brilliant at this young age.
item.content:encoded: I saw you have developed an android OCR app using tesseract. I am now doing the same thing. I think you are brilliant at this young age.

item.title: By: Vijendra
item.dc:creator: Vijendra
item.description: Hey Gautam Best of luck and good you have portfolio website now
item.content:encoded:
Hey Gautam
Best of luck and good you have portfolio website now
